◎简　　介  

　　Anek is a political action thriller, a fierce undercover agent Joshua (Ayushmann Khurrana), is on a mission to unite the country. The film follows Joshua’s journey in a conflict-ridden region of Northeast India, where he’s posted to facilitate a Peace Accord with the largest militant group and its rebel leader - Tiger Sanga.
